items.question: How do I sign in as admin?
items.answer: Enter your allowlisted username and use the Admin sign in button in the session panel.

items.question: Where do CMS edits appear?
items.answer: Edits in /admin update the JSON content files and are reflected after deployment.

items.question: Can I clear generated tasks?
items.answer: Yes. Use Reset Generated Tasks and confirm in the modal.
